title: ASR Tactical Drop Point Blade Thumb Assist Pocket Knife Stainless Steel – Black
description:
The ASR Tactical Drop Point Blade Pocket Knife is the perfect tool for everyday carry. Constructed of durable stainless steel that won’t rust, you can count on it rain or shine, making it a great option for hunters and campers. The drop point blade features a convex spine that is designed to be easily controlled, so you’ll get the perfect cut every time. It boasts a cool black ergonomic handle that will keep your hand steady and safe during use. Our pocket knife also comes with a convenient steel pocket clip so you can easily secure it inside of your pocket when not in use to protect yourself and the blade. It features an easy-to-use thumb assist open for quick deployment. Its compact design makes this a great EDC tool without adding bulk!

ASR Tactical Drop Point Blade Thumb Assist Pocket Knife Stainless Steel – Black

The ASR Tactical Drop Point Blade Pocket Knife is the perfect tool for everyday carry. Constructed of durable stainless steel that won’t rust, you can count on it rain or shine, making it a great option for hunters and campers.

Key Features

  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – Made stainless steel, the ASR Tactical pocket knife won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine. It features a sleek black ergonomic handle for safe and easy handling.
  • DROP POINT BLADE – The convex spine of drop point blades are designed to be easily controlled, making this a great blade for hunters and campers.
  • STEEL POCKET CLIP – The knife comes with a convenient black steel pocket clip so you can secure it inside of your pocket to keep it safe when not in use.
  • THUMB ASSIST OPEN – Our pocket knife features an easy-to-use thumb assist open for quick deployment. The compact design makes this a great EDC tool without adding bulk.
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Overall length: 8”; Blade length: 3.25”; Handle length: 4.75”; Material: Stainless steel; Weight: 5.7 ounces/.36 pounds

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRTBLKPKN8
  • UPC: 810058486615
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 9 in
